staking_plan.notes: Singles carry most of the bankroll. Accumulators are kept small and limited to 3 legs with total odds between 3 and 5. System bet is a small speculative position to reduce variance versus a straight acca.

singles.reason: Strongest home lean in the dataset with recent form 7W-2D-1L and a clear probability edge over the away side.
Away side has the better win probability and recent form; X2 is the lower-variance way to back the stronger side.

accumulators.reason: Balanced 3-leg acca using only selections at or above the confidence threshold and staying within the target odds range.

system_bets.reason: Small protection-oriented system built from three qualifying legs to reduce the all-or-nothing risk of a straight accumulator.
